item.title: Cort A6 Plus 2025 — $765.44
item.description:
$765.44 · Excellent · Bass Direct

2025 Cort Artisan A6 Plus in natural satin finish, this bass features a mahogany body topped with a gorgeous flame maple facing wood.

5 piece neck consisting of maple and wenge for strength and tone, and a wenge fingerboard, 35” scale.

Bartolini pickups couple with a Markbass preamp for punch, clarity and versatility.

Presented in immaculate condition.

item.title: Spector Euro 4 LX Neck-Thru 2025 - Haunted Moss Matte — $2,579.37
item.description:
$2,579.37 · Excellent · Bass Direct

The Euro LX offers all the features that have made the Spector name famous around the globe. Inspired by the iconic NS-2, Euro LX basses feature a fully carved and contoured body, high-grade tonewoods, and professional-grade elec­tronics and hardware. For the first time ever, players can now choose between neck-thru and bolt-on construction in the Euro LX range.

Each Euro LX bass, regardless of construction, is crafted using premium materials, including a European Alder body, figured European Maple top, and a 3-piece North American Maple neck combined with a Rosewood fingerboard for strength, stability, and sustain. These basses are then outfitted with a lightweight aluminum bridge for spot-on, reliable intonation. Premium active pickups from EMG provide the exceptional clarity, attack, and silent operation that Spector is known for.

Spector is proud to offer the all-new Spector Legacy preamp for the Euro LX range. This new preamp was designed in collaboration with Darkglass Elec­tronics to deliver the classic ‘Spector growl’ heard on countless iconic recordings over the years. The newly revised Euro LX range is available in four distinct, hand-rubbed stains, including Transparent Black, Natural Sunburst, Haunted Moss, and Nightshade. Each of these enchanting colors features a durable and comfort­able matte finish.

Rediscover the Spector experience with the all-new Euro LX lineup.

EMG PICKUPS – Premium active pickups from EMG provide the exceptional clarity, attack, and silent operation that Spector is known for.

SPECTOR LEGACY PREAMP – Designed in collaboration with Darkglass Elec­tronics to deliver the classic ‘Spector growl’ heard on countless iconic recordings over the years supplemented with modern versatility.

NECK-THRU CONSTRUCTION – Neck-thru construction is a key element of the classic Spector style and sound, allowing effortless playability and pronounced mid-range response.


  • TOP WOOD Flame Maple
  • BACK WOOD European Alder with a slice of Walnut
  • NECK WOOD 3-piece Maple with Graphite Rods inside for additional strength
  • FRETBOARD Rosewood
  • NUMBER OF FRETS 24
  • INLAYS Mother of Pearl Crowns
  • NUT Brass
  • NUT WIDTH 1.64″
  • SCALE 34″
  • CONTROLS Volume, Blend, Treble Cut/Boost, Bass Cut/Boost
  • PICKUPS Active EMG
  • PICKUP CONFIGURATION P/J
  • PREAMP SYSTEM Spector Legacy Preamp by Darkglass: Bass: ±12 dB @ 60 Hz, Treble: ± 12 dB @ 1kHz
  • HARDWARE Black
  • BRIDGE Aluminum Locking w/ Brass Saddles
  • TUNERS Sealed Die-Cast Spector Tuners
  • FINISH Matte
  • STRINGS D’Addario XL Nickel
  • CASE GIG BAG
  • ADDITIONAL INFO 19mm String Spacing
  • WEIGHT 8lbs0oz/3.7kg

item.title: Swing Hybrid BM Acoustic Electric 4 String Bass Guitar All Solid Piezo Magnetic Stainless Fret — $640
item.description:
$640 · Brand New · Hitchhiker Music

The Swing Hybrid Series can be used as an alternative to either acoustic or electric basses. With its lightweight and slim body, it is especially suitable for women with smaller frames or children. It is also an excellent choice for environments sensitive to noise, making it an ideal substitute for a traditional acoustic bass.

The body is made from all-solid wood, and notably, the back and sides are crafted from a single solid wood piece. Instead of using laminated or glued parts, the inside is routed using CNC processing to optimize the resonance of the body.

The magnetic pickup installed in the rosette and the piezo pickup mounted under the saddle work together to deliver a rich and versatile tone. These two pickups can be used independently or blended together, providing a wide range of tonal options.

Specification

  • Body: All-Solid White Wood
  • Top: Solid Mahogany
  • Neck: Mahogany with 2 Carbon Fiber Neck Rods
  • Fretboard: Richlite
  • Frets: Stainless Steel
  • Scale: 762mm(30”)
  • Radius: 406mm(16”)
  • Nut & Saddle: Bone
  • Nut Width: 40mm(1.57”)
  • Tuners: Swing Die-Cast
  • Electronics: Multiple-B (Piezo & Magnetic Pickup)
  • Controls: 2V2T (1 Volume and 1 Tone Each for Piezo & Magnetic Pickups)
  • Case: Swing Gig Bag

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Stingray 2016 - Chocolate Burst — $4,179.54
item.description:
$4,179.54 · Excellent · Philippe's Gear Outlet

Musicman Stingray in superb condition. Not a single scratch or dent in the paintwork.

"Smoothie Sunburst" finish, white pickguard, maple neck & fretboard, original hard case. Weight 4,3 kg. 

The “Old Smoothie” StingRay, is a faithful reproduction of StingRay prototype #26, designed for Sterling Ball during his time spent testing and developing the original prototypes back in the 70’s. Named for its smooth even tone that is reminiscent of the highly sought after vintage Music Man StingRay sound, “Old Smoothie” has been precisely reproduced including the one-of-a-kind custom made 10 pole piece pickup design, body headstock and pickguard shape, 34-inch scale maple neck and fingerboard, low profile narrow frets, active electronics, hardware and exclusive chocolate-burst finish. 

This is an all-round excellent bass, the sound is warm and punchy and has a great action allowing for superb playability up and down the neck.

item.title: Vanguard 6S2 — $2,385.92
item.description:
$2,385.92 · Mint · Bnj Guitars

The Vanguard 6 is a six-string bass with a very determined character. The padouk body, the wenge neck, and the addition of the maple top create an enveloping sound rich in harmonics and resonances characteristic of woods. The weight is not small, but the Padouk has its merits, and, once you take up the bass, its sound will make you forget the weight. Combined with the woods, there are the two humbuckers and the Delano preamp, which significantly increase the qualities of this instrument.

Long scale, 35". The sixth string will not lose definition and tension.

You will have no problem playing prog rock, metal or even jazz. The bass that every six-string player should have with them.

Weight: 5,0 Kg

Body Color: Top Blonde, Back Natural

Body Wood: Top Acero Fiammato, Body Padouk

Bridge Spacing: 18 mm

Scale Length: 35”

Neck Width: 19.5 mm al Tasto 1, 23.5 mm al Tasto 12

Neck Dimension: 55 mm al Capotasto, 71.2 al Tasto 12

Neck Shape: D

Neck Wood: Wenge/Acero

Fingerboard Wood: Wenge

Radius: 16”

Frets: 22, Medium Jumbo

Neck Finishing: Olio

Neck Joint: Bolt on

Preamp Delano Sonar 3:

Alti +/- 18db @ 5khz

Bassi +/- 16db @ 45Hz

Medi +/- 14db @ 500Hz

Volume Push-Pull A/P

Blend

item.title: Travis Bean TB2000 1970s - Natural — $7,164.92
item.description:
$7,164.92 · Very Good · Ruggero's Gear Locker

For sale is an original Travis Bean TB2000 bass, serial number #691, dating to approximately 1977.

This is one of the iconic vintage Travis Bean instruments featuring the legendary machined aluminum neck-through construction, renowned for its exceptional sustain, clarity, and unmistakable tone. Produced in relatively small numbers, original TB2000 basses have become highly sought-after by collectors and professional musicians alike.

Specifications

  • Model: Travis Bean TB2000
  • Year: circa 1977
  • Serial Number: 691
  • Original aluminum neck-through design
  • Original electronics and hardware (to the best of my knowledge)
  • Made in USA

Condition
The bass is in very good vintage condition with normal cosmetic wear consistent with its age. It has been well cared for and functions exactly as it should. The neck is straight, the truss rod operates correctly, and the electronics work flawlessly.

The instrument delivers the signature Travis Bean sound: huge sustain, piano-like note definition, powerful low end, and outstanding articulation.

A fantastic opportunity to own an increasingly rare piece of American guitar-making history.

Please examine all photos carefully, as they form part of the description.

Worldwide shipping is available. The instrument will be packed professionally and fully insured.

item.title: Edwar DS E J 85 Tm Glitter (07/06) — $739.96
item.description:
$739.96 · Good · ISHIBASHI MUSIC

An Edwards version of the model named after J, the bassist of LUNA SEA, featuring a distinctive red glitter finish.
The body is made of alder, the neck is maple, the fingerboard is likely rosewood, and it is equipped with one humbucker pickup.

There is some twisting in the neck, and you may hear some crackling noise when operating the controls. The guitar will be delivered as-is.
Ten frets have been re-installed, and the frets have been leveled.
The tone control knob has been replaced with a non-original part.
There are numerous dents on the headstock accompanied by paint chipping, and the body shows scuff marks and playing wear. The metal parts exhibit paint chipping, discoloration, and pitting.
There are other signs of wear and discoloration, but overall, the condition is good.
The zipper pull on the pocket of the included case is broken.
Neck Condition: Twisted
Truss rod: There is room to tighten or loosen it
Fret wear: 60?70%
Case: Soft case / Not original
Accessories: None
Condition Grade: B: Shows significant wear and signs of use, but is in good working condition for normal use
Weight: 5.06 kg

item.title: YAMAHA TRBX174 Black 2023 [IJ0033015] (07/06) — $357
item.description:
$357 · Good · ISHIBASHI MUSIC

Yamaha's entry-level bass is now in stock, used!!

This electric bass is the perfect entry-level model. Although designed for beginners, it offers stable playability and reliability.
With its well-balanced body, it reduces fatigue even during long playing sessions, making it ideal not only for practicing at home but also for band activities and live performances.

Featuring a PJ pickup configuration, it allows for a wide range of tones?from the thick, powerful sound of a Precision Bass to the well-defined sound of a Jazz Bass.
Itfs versatile across all genres and works well with a variety of musical styles, including rock, pop, and funk.

Based on the serial number, this instrument appears to have been manufactured in 2023.
Although there is a dent on the lower part of the body and minor playwear and scuffs are scattered throughout, it plays perfectly well and is still fully usable.

item.title: Warwick Stryker Quilted Maple 4-String Nirvana Black OFC [F 154459 10] (07/06) — $4,900.63
item.description:
$4,900.63 · Good · ISHIBASHI MUSIC

Wefve just received a very rare Warwick bass!
Warwick is one of Germanyfs leading bass manufacturers, known for its distinctive body shapes and specifications, and this particular model stands out for its exceptional character.

Much like the BUZZARD?a model favored by John Wentwhistle, known as the bassist for The Who?this bass features a headstock shaped like an eaglefs beak and an EX-shaped body with rounded corners, creating a striking visual impact.

It features a 5-piece flamed maple neck with a through-neck construction, mahogany body wings, and quilted maple on the top and back, complemented by gold hardware that lends it a luxurious feel.

It is equipped with two MEC P-type pickups, along with master volume, balancer, and 3-band EQ controls; the master volume knob also features a push/pull switch to toggle between active and passive modes.

With its rich, full-bodied sound?typical of Warwick?this bass ensures the instrumentfs presence is clearly felt even within an ensemble, making it suitable for a wide range of genres.

There are some scratches around the strap pins, and a few dents are scattered across the tip of the headstock, the neck grip, and the body; however, the instrument shows minimal signs of wear.
Due to the neck being twisted and warped, the frets have been filed down, so there is relatively little fret material remaining.
The truss rod is functional, but there is little room left to tighten it further.
Although the neck condition isnft perfect, there are currently no issues with muffled tones or buzzing frets, and playability is good.

An intuitive blend that delivers immediate results?a practical PJ that balances thickness and clarity

The G&L SB-2CFS PREMIUM MIJ is a model based on the SB-2 designed by Leo Fender, precision-crafted as part of the Japanese-made premium line. The Circle Fretting System (CFS) improves intonation and chord cohesion, delivering consistent performance from live shows to recording sessions.

The PJ pickup layout delivers an extremely thick low end from the front pickup and adds attack and definition from the rear pickup. It has a more assertive presence than a typical PJ setup, making it stand out clearly even within a band ensemble.

The controls feature a practical configuration consisting of a master volume/balancer with stacked knobs, plus a master tone control. This allows for intuitive adjustment of pickup balance while maintaining volume, making it exceptionally easy to use on stage.

Combining a design philosophy directly rooted in the USA with the precision finish unique to Japanese craftsmanship, this is a simple yet highly refined instrument.

item.description:
$2,278.31 · Good · ISHIBASHI MUSIC

A highly refined modern JB sound where clarity and speed make all the difference

Rebuilt as a German-made MetroLine model, this guitar is based on the traditional JB style while achieving a high level of balance between the responsiveness and tonal balance sought by modern players.

The chambered swamp ash body delivers a lightweight feel and fast attack, characterized by a crisp attack, tight low end, and clear high end. Sadowskifs signature wide-range, well-defined tone ensures it wonft get lost in an ensemble, making it an instantly usable asset across all genres.

It is equipped with J-style humbucker-canceling pickups that suppress noise while delivering a clear sound image. Furthermore, the combination of an active 2-band EQ and VTC allows for flexible control, ranging from modern sounds to vintage-like nuances.

In terms of playability, it features a practical design with a smooth neck grip, an easy-to-play 21-fret configuration, and the Just-A-Nut III system for precise adjustments.

As a high-end model that refines the JB style, this guitar delivers outstanding performance whether on stage or in the recording studio.

A High-End, Practical Modern JB-Style Guitar Is Here
The Bacchus IMPRESSION 35-4 is an active guitar that combines the premium materials and construction expected of a high-end model with a thorough commitment to practicality. Based on a JB-style pickup layout, its control panel?featuring a 3-band EQ and adjustable midrange?enables a wide range of sound shaping.

The Lakland SK-4DX features a pickup layout that combines MM-type and JB-type pickups, making it a highly versatile instrument capable of handling a wide range of genres. By blending the powerful, thick low end of the rear humbucker with the clear, nuanced tone of the front JB-type pickup, it delivers a modern, well-balanced sound.

The construction?featuring an alder body paired with a quilted maple top?delivers both a rich resonance and a clear attack. Combined with the stable string tension characteristic of a 34-inch scale, it firmly supports tight, focused bass tones.

The preamp features a 3-band EQ and supports active/passive switching as well as coil tapping. It allows for a wide range of tone shaping?from slap to rock and pop?and adapts flexibly to everything from live performances to recording sessions.

The exterior features a striking translucent finish that highlights the wood grain, offering a luxurious look that stands out on stage. This highly practical hybrid bass offers an excellent balance of playability, sound, and aesthetics.

A high-end, versatile PJ that allows for precise control over both thickness and projection

Based on the American Professional model, this limited-edition version features a roasted maple neck and stacked knobs. It combines the traditional PB style with practical control and stability.

It balances the rich, full-bodied bass produced by the front split-coil pickup with the fast attack and clear definition of the rear single-coil pickup. Furthermore, the stacked knobs?which allow independent adjustment of Volume and Tone for each pickup?enable precise tone shaping that goes beyond simple blending.It flexibly accommodates the subtle nuances demanded on stage, whether you want to keep the front pickupfs rich tone while adding clarity with the rear, or make the rear pickup stand out brightly on its own.

The roasted maple neck offers high rigidity and resistance to environmental changes, maintaining stable performance. Its smooth texture and moderate stiffness deliver a tight, responsive playing feel.

This highly practical PJ bass?a complete instrument in its own right?seamlessly blends vintage richness with modern clarity and exceptional playability.

item.description:
$1,421.51 · Good · ISHIBASHI MUSIC

Atelier Z JHJ-189 MBK

The flagship model of the JHJ series, combining the playability of a JB-style pickup with the power of a humbucker. It features JB-style pickups in the front and rear positions and a humbucker in the center, allowing you to instantly switch between sounds using a mini-switch. This stage-ready design delivers everything from a delicate, clear JB sound to a powerful, punchy tone?all in a single guitar.

The control layout consists of front volume, rear volume (with push/pull to toggle between active and passive modes), a 2-band EQ, and humbucker volume. This allows for intuitive tone shaping even while playing, offering high on-stage versatility without the need to switch guitars.

The fast-responding tone, built around an ash body and maple fingerboard, faithfully inherits Atelier Zfs signature clarity and tight low end. It seamlessly transitions from a wide-range, hi-fi sound in active mode to a natural JB tone in passive mode.

The combination of a subdued matte black finish and a mirror pickguard creates a look that is simple yet commands a strong presence.

For players who want a single instrument to handle any genre.
This is truly a performance-oriented hybrid bass that gmasterfully balances two distinct personalities.h

The ultimate Precision Bass sound, perfected to the highest standard.
The Fender USA American Vintage '57 Precision Bass is a vintage reissue model that faithfully reproduces the 1957 specifications. Featuring split-coil pickups, it embodies the sound and construction that can be considered the prototype of the modern Precision Bass.
The balanced tone unique to an alder body is characterized by a thick, stable low end and a punchy midrange, allowing it to make a strong presence even within a band ensemble. With its neutral character and ease of play, it performs exceptionally well across a wide range of genres.
It adheres to vintage specifications down to the finest details, including a one-piece maple neck, a 7.25-inch radius, and a nitrocellulose lacquer finish. Furthermore, the gold anodized pickguard is a major visual feature, giving it a distinctive 1950s-era presence.

Marcus Miller is sometimes hailed as one of the worldfs top three bassists. This Japanese-made model is based on the 1977 Jazz Bass he used and is believed to have been manufactured between 2002 and 2004.

item.description:
$616.64 · Good · ISHIBASHI MUSIC

This is the AP MAB-04, a Custom Shop model from Aria (Aria Pro II).

Manufactured by the Aria Custom Shop, this guitar was created using the gAP Order System,h which allowed for various customizations based on the AP model. It features a light ash body, a maple neck, a laminated maple fingerboard, 24 frets, a heel-less bolt-on joint, GOTOH tuners, a BTB-04 bridge, and an original JJ pickup layout with Volume/Balance/Treble/Bass controls, all finished in gold hardware.

This Aria Custom Shop AP, which was part of the top-tier lineup back in the f90s, boasts a wide range of tonal variations and excellent playability.

The four knobs have been replaced, and there are signs of wear (including discoloration, minor scratches and scuffs, scuff marks and playing lines, picking marks, and discoloration, clouding, pitting, or rust on metal parts and screws, among other cosmetic damage).

item.title: Atelier Z babyZ-4J Vintage Burgundy Mist [242351] (07/06) — $837.33
item.description:
$837.33 · Very Good · ISHIBASHI MUSIC

Compact yet authentic?the ultimate short-scale bass
The ATELIER Z babyZ-4J Vintage is a JB-style bass featuring a 30-inch short scale. Itfs a practical instrument that combines excellent maneuverability and playability with a solid, well-defined low-end.
Featuring the classic combination of an alder body, maple neck, and rosewood fingerboard, itfs equipped with an original J-style pickup. It strikes a balance between the natural tone characteristic of a passive setup and the tight, well-defined sound thatfs a hallmark of Atelier Z.
In addition to the soft string tension and light, responsive feel characteristic of a short scale, it offers excellent string separation and pitch stability. Its versatility?handling everything from fingerstyle to pick and slap playing?makes it suitable for any genre.
With features like a carbon-reinforced neck for stability and an intuitive control layout, this guitar offers professional-grade specifications that go beyond its compact appearance. Lightweight and effortless to play, itfs built to serve as your go-to instrument.
This is a truly reliable instrument that shatters the notion that gshort scale equals backup.h
While there are some minor scratches and dents, itfs in relatively good condition.
The neck is in good condition, and the instrument plays well.
Condition Grade: A: Excellent Condition

Serial Number: 242351
Country of Manufacture: China

item.title: Fender Mexico Player II Mustang Bass PJ 3-Color Sunburst [MX24069219] (07/06) — $824.34
item.description:
$824.34 · Very Good · ISHIBASHI MUSIC

A Mustang Bass model that combines a PJ pickup configuration with a compact 30-inch scale.
Made in 2024.

While retaining the traditional, easy-to-handle size of the Mustang Bass, this model features an alder body, a Modern "C"-shaped maple neck, a maple fingerboard with a 9.5-inch radius, and 19 frets. The Player II series is designed with playability in mind, featuring rolled fingerboard edges and a satin-finished neck back, allowing you to enjoy the comfortable feel unique to a short-scale instrument.

It is equipped with a Player Series Alnico V Split Precision Bass pickup and a Player Series Alnico V Jazz Bass single-coil pickup. The 3-way toggle switch covers a wide range of tones, from the thick, powerful sound characteristic of a Precision Bass to the well-defined sound of a Jazz Bass, as well as a well-balanced tone that blends the two. The rich, warm bass tones unique to the 30-inch scale are also a major attraction.
While there are a few minor scratches, the guitar is in good condition overall with minimal signs of use.
There are no noticeable issues with the neck, and it is in excellent playing condition.

item.title: Ibanez GSR205B-WNF Walnut Flat Ibanez 5-String Active Bass (07/06) — $369.98
item.description:
$369.98 · Good · ISHIBASHI MUSIC

A beginner-friendly 5-string bass featuring the renowned SR shape. This is the Ibanez GIO Series GSR205B active 5-string bass.

It features an Okume body, a maple neck, a Purpleheart fingerboard, a 45mm nut, a 34-inch scale length, and a 305R profile. The pickups are configured in an H-H setup with Dynamix H pickups, and it features an active circuit with 2 Volume, Tone, and Phat II EQ controls (with small-diameter knobs).

With its comfortable SR shape and a playing position similar to a JB-type bass when standing, this 5-string model for beginners offers excellent playability.

The serial number has been removed and is unreadable; there are signs of wear (minor scratches, scuffs, wear marks, visible picking marks on the wood, tarnish, pitting, and rust on metal parts and screws, and other cosmetic damage).

It was set up upon arrival (cleaning, string replacement, truss rod adjustment, octave adjustment, and string height adjustment). The frets are at a height that does not interfere with playing, and the truss rod has been checked to move smoothly up to 60‹ in both directions, confirming it is in good working order.

item.title: YAMAHA BB434 Tobacco Brown Sunburst [IKM144326] (07/06) — $571.20
item.description:
$571.20 · Good · ISHIBASHI MUSIC

A passive P/J bass that carries on the traditional BB sound.
The BB400 series is the core of Yamahafs BB lineup. Featuring an alder body, a 5-piece maple/mahogany neck, and YGD Custom V5 (Alnico V) P/J pickups, this passive 4-string model offers classic specifications.

The front pickup delivers thick, full-bodied, Precision-style bass tones, while the rear pickup offers a crisp, Jazz-style attack. Depending on the blend, it handles a wide range of genres, from rock and pop to funk. Combined with the high neck rigidity provided by the 6-bolt miter joint, it offers a stable, responsive tone with excellent sustain.
There are some minor scuffs and dirt, but no particularly noticeable scratches.
